vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are not visible as healthy specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present but appears to be in a state of severe decline or dormancy.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: Not identifiable in the provided frames.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No foliage present; only soil and debris visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos is present, but the white rabbit anchor is obscured or absent in later frames.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No evidence of the Silver Guest specimen.

plant_audit.P1: No plant matter detected. Soil surface appears undisturbed.
plant_audit.P2: No plant matter detected. Soil surface appears dark and potentially desiccated.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos specimen shows signs of severe stress. The white rabbit anchor is present in early frames but disappears in later frames, suggesting a potential shift in the biome arrangement or loss of the anchor.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Soil appears consistently dark and dry across all frames.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, crystalline or shell-like fragments on the surface of the pots, likely an intervention or additive.
biome_observations.lighting: Fixed LED lighting is consistent, but the final two frames are completely black, indicating a total failure of the light source or camera sensor.

temporal_deltas.Earliest_to_T-2: Minimal change observed; the pots remain largely empty of visible foliage.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_Current: Total loss of visual data (black frames). The biome is no longer observable.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical failure. The lack of visible foliage across all pots suggests either total plant death or an extremely dormant state. The final two frames indicate a complete loss of monitoring capability.
anomalies: White shell-like fragments on soil surface (Intervention).
Total loss of visual feed in final frames (Systemic Monitoring Failure).
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic decline in the botanical biome. From the earliest image, the pots appear devoid of the expected healthy specimens, showing only soil and mysterious white debris. By the final frames, the visual feed has collapsed into total darkness, rendering further observation impossible. The environment appears to have been abandoned or the monitoring equipment has failed.
